'''Kaine Paulsen''', also known as ''Chu'la'', was a legendary [[Socorran]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and the father of [[Drake Paulsen]].

==Biography==
In his younger days, he would work for the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] crimelord [[Abdi-Badawzi]]. He was a shrewd business man and a master pilot who was also an excellent [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogator]], knowing his way around the many [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace lanes]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. He was rumored to keep a journal of galactic short-cut and by-ways, and that this was the cause of his incredible success.

He had contacts all over the galaxy, and had specially good relations with the [[Coynite/Legends|Coynites]] due to his friendship with the respected Coynite warrior [[Tra'Parr'Sratt]].

When Kaine's wife [[Death/Legends|died]], he vowed to raise his son in accordance with the proud traditions of the Socorran pirates. He never [[Marriage/Legends|remarried]].
